seed_instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area.
org_constraint: The second sentence must include the keyword "cozy."
new_constraint: Use the word "comfortable" in place of "cozy" in your review.
instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. The second sentence must include the keyword "cozy." Use the word "comfortable" in place of "cozy" in your review.
response: I recently visited "The Roasted Bean," a charming new spot that just opened downtown. The atmosphere is incredibly comfortable, making it the perfect place to settle in with a book. I ordered a vanilla latte and a blueberry muffin, both of which were absolutely delicious. The baristas were friendly, and the interior design feels very welcoming. I will definitely be returning next weekend!<turn|>
